title: Blade Toss
description: A wooden log rotates in the center of the screen. Tap to throw a blade from the bottom - it sticks where it lands. Never hit a blade already in the log or it is game over. Occasionally an apple appears on the log - hit it for a big bonus. 10 stages with unique rotation patterns: slow steady, fast, reversing, alternating fast and slow. Clear all throws per stage to advance to the next.
